publication: notes on the (American) Empire

Dear all,

I recently published a piece for The Graduate Press, a student-run publication here at The Graduate Institute, titled “On Protests, Revolutions, and Empire: Notes on America”. This was for their Spring 2020 REVOLUTION issue. You can download a copy of the issue here.

Always,

A

made with peace in mind, by @aleesteele
